book: THE REVELATION OF ST. JOHN THE DIVINE

verses.text: \+w And\+w* \+w unto the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Sardis\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w he that hath\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w seven\+w* \+w Spirits\+w* \+w of God\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w seven\+w* \+w stars\+w*; \+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou hast\+w* \+w a name\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou livest\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w art\+w* \+w dead\+w*.

\+w Be\+w* \+w watchful\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w strengthen\+w* \+w the things which remain\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w are ready to\+w* \+w die\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w found\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w* \+w perfect\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w God\+w*.

\+w Remember\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w thou hast received\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w heard\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hold fast\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w repent\+w*. \+w If\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w thou shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w watch\+w*, \+w I will come\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w a thief\+w*, \+w and\+w* thou shalt \+w not\+w* \+w know\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w hour\+w* \+w I will come\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w thee\+w*.

\+w Thou hast\+w* \+w a few\+w* \+w names\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Sardis\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w defiled\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w garments\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w they shall walk\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w white\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they are\+w* \+w worthy\+w*.

\+w He that overcometh\+w*, \+w the same\+w* \+w shall be clothed\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w white\+w* \+w raiment\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w I will\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w blot out\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w the book\+w* \+w of life\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w I will confess\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w angels\+w*.
\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w to the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Philadelphia\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w he that is holy\+w*, \+w he that is true\+w*, \+w he that hath\+w* \+w the key\+w* \+w of David\+w*, \+w he that openeth\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w shutteth\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w shutteth\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w openeth\+w*;

\+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*: \+w behold\+w*, \+w I have set\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w an\+w* \+w open\+w* \+w door\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w can\+w* \+w shut\+w* \+w it\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w thou hast\+w* \+w a little\+w* \+w strength\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast kept\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w word\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hast\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w denied\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*.

\+w Behold\+w*, \+w I will make\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the synagogue\+w* \+w of Satan\+w*, \+w which say\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w Jews\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w do lie\+w*; \+w behold\+w*, \+w I will make\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w worship\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w feet\+w*, \+w and\+w* to \+w know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w have loved\+w* \+w thee\+w*.

\+w Because\+w* \+w thou hast kept\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w patience\+w*, \+w I also\+w* \+w will keep\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the hour\+w* \+w of temptation\+w*, \+w which shall\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the world\+w*, \+w to try\+w* \+w them that dwell\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the earth\+w*.
\+w Behold\+w*, \+w I come\+w* \+w quickly\+w*: \+w hold\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w fast\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w thou hast\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w take\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w crown\+w*.

\+w Him\+w* \+w that overcometh\+w* \+w will I make\+w* \+w a pillar\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the temple\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w God\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w he shall go\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w out\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w I will write\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w the name\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w God\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the name\+w* \+w of the city\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w God\+w*, \+add which is\+add* \+w new\+w* \+w Jerusalem\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w cometh down\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w heaven\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w God\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+add I will write upon him\+add* \+w my\+w* \+w new\+w* \+w name\+w*.
\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w unto the angel\+w* \+w of the church\+w* \+w of the Laodiceans\+w* \+w write\+w*; \+w These things\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w the Amen\+w*, \+w the\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w true\+w* \+w witness\+w*, \+w the beginning\+w* \+w of the creation\+w* \+w of God\+w*;
\+w I know\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou art\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w cold\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w hot\+w*: \+w I would\+w* \+w thou wert\+w* \+w cold\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w hot\+w*.

\+w So then\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w thou art\+w* \+w lukewarm\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w cold\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w hot\+w*, \+w I will\+w* \+w spue\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w mouth\+w*.

\+w Because\+w* \+w thou sayest\+w*, \+w I am\+w* \+w rich\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w increased with goods\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w need\+w* \+w of nothing\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w knowest\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w art\+w* \+w wretched\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w miserable\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w poor\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w blind\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w naked\+w*:

\+w I counsel\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w to buy\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w gold\+w* \+w tried\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the fire\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou mayest be rich\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w white\+w* \+w raiment\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou mayest be clothed\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add that\+add* \+w the shame\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w nakedness\+w* \+w do not\+w* \+w appear\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w anoint\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w eyes\+w* \+w with eyesalve\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou mayest see\+w*.
\+w As many as\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w love\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w rebuke\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w chasten\+w*: \+w be zealous\+w* \+w therefore\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w repent\+w*.

\+w Behold\+w*, \+w I stand\+w* \+w at\+w* \+w the door\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w knock\+w*: \+w if\+w* \+w any man\+w* \+w hear\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w voice\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w open\+w* \+w the door\+w*, \+w I will come in\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will sup\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w To him\+w* \+w that overcometh\+w* \+w will I grant\+w* \+w to sit\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w throne\+w*, \+w even as\+w* \+w I also\+w* \+w overcame\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w am set down\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w throne\+w*.
\+w He that hath\+w* \+w an ear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto the churches\+w*.
